page: Amazon Web Services g6e.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for graphics-intensive and memory-heavy workloads. It features an AMD EPYC 7R13 processor with 32 vCPUs and 16 physical cores running at 3.4 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, which provides 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA L40S GPU based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, offering 45 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage consists of a 900 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a 25 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance in large language model inference tasks. The instance achieves top 10% placement in prompt processing and text generation speeds across small, medium, and large models. Single-core CPU performance, image processing, memory scores, and CPU encryption tests rank in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall within the average range.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the g6e.8xlarge offers a dense allocation of memory and dedicated GPU resources on the Nitro hypervisor, making it a viable option for workloads requiring high VRAM and local NVMe storage without the overhead of multi-GPU setups. The instance is suited for LLM inference, image processing, cryptographic tasks, and graphics-intensive applications.
description: Amazon Web Services g6e.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 32 vCPUs from an AMD EPYC 7R13 processor running at 3.4 GHz, paired with 256.0 GB of DDR4 memory. It includes a single NVIDIA L40S GPU with 45 GB of VRAM, a 900 GB NVMe SSD, and 25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in LLM inference for prompt processing and text generation across various model sizes, alongside strong single-core CPU and image processing capabilities. The instance provides a balanced hardware profile for memory-intensive graphics workloads, cryptographic operations, and machine learning inference.
og_description: Amazon Web Services g6e.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, a 45 GB NVIDIA L40S GPU, and a 900 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier LLM inference performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services g6e.8xlarge features 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, a 45 GB NVIDIA L40S GPU, and 900 GB NVMe SSD storage for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: An accelerated server combining dedicated AMD EPYC processing, 256 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA L40S GPU for high-throughput language model inference.
bullet_points: AMD EPYC 7R13 processor with 32 vCPUs and 256 GB DDR4 memory
Single NVIDIA L40S GPU with 45 GB VRAM for hardware acceleration
900 GB local NVMe SSD storage and 25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier benchmark performance in LLM prompt processing and text generation
Strong single-core CPU execution, image processing, and encryption capabilities
Suited for machine learning inference, graphics rendering, and database operations
